title: Vanilla Plus FO
description:
A Vanilla Plus pack with simple alterations, built off of Fabulously Optimised 1.20.1. 

Respective credit goes to the creators of FO.
body:
# About
This is a Vanilla Plus style pack built on Fabulously Optimised (version 1.20.1), some minor changes were made for compatibility. Respective credit goes to the creators of FO.

## Alterations Include:

1. Terrain & World Gen
2. Inventory & Mouse Tweaks
3. Ore Gen
4. Minor Storage Upgrades
5. New Armor and Tools
6. Village Overhaul
7. New Structures
8. Anvil & Enchanting
9. EMI (All Addons)

# Recommended
**Shaders:**
- Kappa Shaders

**Resource Packs:**
- Coven x64
- Pinku's Pink GUI Pack
- Pinku's Pink GUI Pack Addons
- Enhanced Boss Bars
- Even Better Enchants
- Motschen's Better Leaves
- Visible Ores
- Dramatic Skys




### Credits

Fabulously Optimised - [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized/versions)

Mod Menu Helper - overrides/resourcepacks/Mod Menu Helper.zip
